stories.title: Recall — CreateOn Pip-Cubes (Crayola-Branded) Magnets Can Kill If Swallowed

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: RECALL: Crayola-branded Pip-Cubes magnetic building blocks are recalled. Seams split and release high-powered magnets that kill if swallowed. Stop use now, return for a free replacement. createon.com/recall 📢 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Crayola-branded Pip-Cubes are on the CPSC recall list. Magnetic building sets sold at Michaels and Amazon, May–July 2025. Two swallowed magnets can attract inside a child's body. Check yours now: 800-333-0549 🧲 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Recall — Zippee Silicone Activity Toys Pose Serious Choking Risk (117,500 Units)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Recall: 117,500 Zippee silicone toys recalled for choking hazard. The teal pull-string toy's ball ends can reach the back of a child's throat. Sold on Amazon 2019–2024. Get a full refund at playmobi.com ⚠️ #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Is there a Zippee silicone toy at your house? Check the date code inside the cylinder (MMDDYY format, 030620–110823). If it's in range, stop use — it's recalled. One child already gagged. 🔍 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: El Paso County Fair Turns 120 — July 11–18 in Calhan ($1 Admission)

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text: El Paso County Fair turns 120 this year — July 11–18 in Calhan, 30 min east of COS. General admission: $1. Rodeo, demolition derby, carnival rides, and live music all week. Full details at elpasocountyfair.com 🎡 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text: Educators, first responders, and healthcare workers: the El Paso County Fair gives you $2 off admission July 11–18 in Calhan. Bring a non-perishable food donation and everyone saves $2. Rodeo, carnival rides, and more. 🎠 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Pikes Peak or Bust Rodeo Returns July 14–18 — Mutton Bustin', Free Drone Show

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Pikes Peak or Bust Rodeo: July 14–18, Norris Penrose. Kids 4–9 can try Mutton Bustin' ($20, helmets + vests provided). Free 14-min drone show July 16 for America's 250th. Tickets: pikespeakorbust.org 🤠 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 5
